title: gpsr_forward: NaN/inf check added but missing test coverage
description:
Router.gpsr_forward() now validates that dst_coords are not NaN/inf and are within valid lat/lon ranges. Good defensive coding, but no test exercises these edge cases. Add tests for:
- dst_coords = (float('nan'), 0.0)
- dst_coords = (float('inf'), 0.0)
- dst_coords = (91.0, 0.0) # invalid latitude

File: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py lines 505-512
